breakpoint.$description: Semantic breakpoint tokens map device-oriented names to primitive thresholds. Each range is defined by a min-width (inclusive) for mobile-first media queries and a max-width for range-scoped queries.

mobile.$description: Mobile layout – min-width start of the mobile range (0–639 px).

mobileMax.$description: Mobile layout – max-width boundary. Use in max-width media queries to target mobile only.

tablet.$description: Tablet layout – min-width start of the tablet range (640–1023 px).

tabletMax.$description: Tablet layout – max-width boundary. Use in max-width media queries to target up to tablet.

desktop.$description: Desktop layout – min-width start of the desktop range (1024–1439 px).

desktopMax.$description: Desktop layout – max-width boundary. Use in max-width media queries to target up to desktop.

widescreen.$description: Widescreen layout – min-width start of the widescreen range (1440 px and above).
